subject: Charged twice for subscription
body: Hello, I am extremely frustrated right now because I noticed that I have been charged twice for the same premium subscription this month. I double-checked my bank account and there are clearly two identical charges within a very short time frame. This is unacceptable and I need an immediate explanation and refund. I have been a loyal user for a long time and this kind of issue really makes me question the reliability of your billing system.

subject: App crashes on login
body: Hi, every time I try to log into the mobile application, it crashes immediately after I enter my credentials. I have already tried restarting my phone, reinstalling the app, and even clearing the cache, but nothing seems to work. This issue is preventing me from accessing important information and it is becoming very frustrating. Please look into this as soon as possible.

subject: Need to change email
body: Hello, I hope you are doing well. I would like to request assistance in updating my account email address because I no longer have access to the previous one. I have tried navigating through the settings but could not find a clear way to make this change. Could you please guide me through the process or update it on your side if possible? Thank you in advance for your help.

subject: Refund not processed
body: Good afternoon, I submitted a refund request over a week ago, but I have not received any updates or confirmation. I understand that these processes can take time, but I would appreciate some transparency regarding the status. This delay is causing inconvenience on my end, and I would really like to know when I can expect the refund to be completed.

subject: Website is very slow
body: Hey, I just wanted to report that the website performance today is extremely slow. Pages take forever to load, and sometimes they don’t load at all. It’s really affecting my ability to use your service properly. I am not sure if this is a server issue or something else, but I hope you can fix it soon.
